reviews.comment:
Pésimo. Cola de más de media hora para cargar. Los empleados re lentos, los llegan a mandar a bs as y que se consideren despedidos en menos de una semana.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. A queue of over half an hour to load. The employees are incredibly slow; if they're sent to Buenos Aires, they can consider themselves fired in less than a week.
